detaileddescription.para: Reference to the main AccelByte subsystem
Current search start time.
Handles advertising sessions over LAN and client searches

Session search handle that is currently being used, this will be set either explicitly by the user when StartMatchmaking is called, or when a start matchmaking notification is received and we need a handle.
In any case, the handle can be grabbed with SessionInt->GetSessionSearch()
Default session settings for a session, set these with SessionInt->SetDefaultSessionSettings. These settings will be used if we get match results but haven't explicitly started a matchmaking session.
Session settings for a specific matchmaking session, these take precedent over the default and are cleared after a session search result is constructed.
#SG Map of session ID to pending matches that we are still in the process of constructing
#SG Array of pending matches used to filter for the best one to attempt to create a session for
#SG Amount of time in seconds that we wish to increase the pending match wait time by between receiving sessions
#SG Amount of time in seconds that we wish to wait between pending matches before filtering and creating a session
#SG Time in seconds elapsed between multiple ticks, used for tracking how long we wish to wait before filtering and constructing a session from pending matches
#NOTE (Maxwell): This is a terrible name for this member but I cannot think of a better one for the life of me
Whether or not we are actively filtering our pending match array
Cache match ticket id from backend, will be used on handling possible race condition during matchmaking queue

Flag describing whether we should continue to get session information as well as create a session object for a match upon receiving a dedicated server notification. #SG Splitgate specific for DS creation in custom games
Current session settings
Critical sections for thread safe operation of session lists
Hidden on purpose
Delegate handler for when we get a notification back from the matchmaker that we have found a match.
Checks if the server for a notification is marked as a waiting area server
Create session information based on a DS notification
Delegate handler for when we get a notification regarding a dedicated server from the AccelByte lobby.
Send a request to get information about a session by its string ID.
Usage of this requires the NAMESPACE:{namespace}:SESSION permission to be set to READ on the OAuth Client
Handler for when we get a failed response back regarding session information.
Handler for when we get a failed response back regarding eject match session.
Construct a FOnlineSessionSearchResult object from the PendingMatchData (if valid) and add it to the SessionSearchHandle (also if valid)
Registers real time delegates for notifications such as matchmaking for the specified user
Method fired when a session result is created for either matchmaking or a waiting area. Will notify proper delegates.
Session tick for various background tasks

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 PlayerNum, class FNamedOnlineSession *Session, const class FOnlineSession *SearchSession)
memberdef.name: JoinLANSession

detaileddescription.para: Delegate fired when we need to send a ready consent message to the matchmaker to join a match.
Normally, you'll either want to just call SessionInt->SendReady(MatchId) if you don't care if players ready up, or have UI to send an explicit ready.
Delegate fired when matchmaking has started.

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 HostingPlayerNum, FName SessionName, const FOnlineSessionSettings &NewSessionSettings) override
memberdef.name: CreateSession

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &HostingPlayerId, FName SessionName, const FOnlineSessionSettings &NewSessionSettings) override
memberdef.name: CreateSession

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArray< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetId > > &LocalPlayers, FName SessionName, const FOnlineSessionSettings &NewSessionSettings, TSharedRef< FOnlineSessionSearch > &SearchSettings) override
memberdef.name: StartMatchmaking

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &SearchingUserId, const FUniqueNetId &SessionId, const FUniqueNetId &FriendId, const FOnSingleSessionResultCompleteDelegate &CompletionDelegate) override
memberdef.name: FindSessionById

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 PlayerNum, FName SessionName, const FOnlineSessionSearchResult &DesiredSession) override
memberdef.name: JoinSession

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &PlayerId, FName SessionName, const FOnlineSessionSearchResult &DesiredSession) override
memberdef.name: JoinSession

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &LocalUserId, const TArray< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetId > > &FriendList) override
memberdef.name: FindFriendSession

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 LocalUserNum, FName SessionName, const FUniqueNetId &Friend) override
memberdef.name: SendSessionInviteToFriend

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &LocalUserId, FName SessionName, const FUniqueNetId &Friend) override
memberdef.name: SendSessionInviteToFriend

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 LocalUserNum, FName SessionName, const TArray< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetId > > &Friends) override
memberdef.name: SendSessionInviteToFriends

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &LocalUserId, FName SessionName, const TArray< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetId > > &Friends) override
memberdef.name: SendSessionInviteToFriends

memberdef.argsstring: (FName SessionName, const FUniqueNetId &PlayerId, bool bWasInvited) override
memberdef.name: RegisterPlayer

memberdef.argsstring: (FName SessionName, const TArray< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetId > > &Players, bool bWasInvited=false) override
memberdef.name: RegisterPlayers

memberdef.argsstring: (FName SessionName, const TArray< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetId > > &Players) override
memberdef.name: UnregisterPlayers

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &PlayerId, FName SessionName, const FOnRegisterLocalPlayerCompleteDelegate &Delegate) override
memberdef.name: RegisterLocalPlayer

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &PlayerId, FName SessionName, const FOnUnregisterLocalPlayerCompleteDelegate &Delegate) override
memberdef.name: UnregisterLocalPlayer

detaileddescription.para: Used to handle notification regarding matchmaking being canceled by the party leader. Can also be used by non-party leaders to back out of matchmaking.
Method to deregister a local or remote server from Armada by its session.
Sends off a ready consent request for the specified match ID.
Sets the default settings for a session to be created with. Used for matchmaking sessions when we did not explicitly start matchmaking ourselves (ex. if a party leader starts matchmaking).
Grabs the current search handle for matchmaking, should be used to get matchmaking status if we did not explicitly start matchmaking.
Enqueues a session to be joinable on the backend, allows for backfill with matchmaking.
Dequeues a joinable session on the backend, disabling backfill through matchmaker.
Query information about a dedicated session from the backend, used to get team and party associations from backfill

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &LocalUserId, const FString &ChannelName, const FString &MatchId, const FOnRemoveUserFromSessionComplete &Delegate=FOnRemoveUserFromSessionComplete())
memberdef.name: RemoveUserFromSession

detaileddescription.para: Remove a user from session in the channel
#SG Send event to session browser service that we have started a match for this session
Get matchmaking ticket id
Set matchmaking ticket ids locally
Empty matchmaking ticket id locally
Continue create pending match data

memberdef.argsstring: (FName SessionName, const FUniqueNetId &PlayerId, int32 InActionID, const FString &InMessage)
memberdef.name: SendBanUser

detaileddescription.para: Construct a new session search result instance from a backend representation of a game session
Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem passed in.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem instance that we wish to get this interface from
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem associated with the world passed in.

parameterdescription.para: World instance that we wish to get the interface from
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise
